records.m_Talk_ENG: 94pWhy...? Just why?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: 94pWhy...? Just why?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: 94pWhy...? Just why?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I struggling against a single Helgon?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I struggling against a single Helgon?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I struggling against a single Helgon?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can see what you've done from seeing your attitude.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can see what you've done from seeing your attitude.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can see what you've done from seeing your attitude.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For a very long time, you have been taking your deceiving of countless people and trampling on their hopes for granted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For a very long time, you have been taking your deceiving of countless people and trampling on their hopes for granted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For a very long time, you have been taking your deceiving of countless people and trampling on their hopes for granted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I am here to stop you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I am here to stop you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I am here to stop you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: My little sister...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My little sister...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My little sister...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am sorry...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am sorry...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am sorry...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sola...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sola...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sola...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no... I cannot lose you again...
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no... I cannot lose you again...
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no... I cannot lose you again...

records.m_Talk_ENG: NOOOOOOO!!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: NOOOOOOO!!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: NOOOOOOO!!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?! What the...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?! What the...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?! What the...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That scream is attracting more monsters...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That scream is attracting more monsters...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That scream is attracting more monsters...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: NOW! Stab her in the heart while she cannot move!
records.m_Talk_DEU: NOW! Stab her in the heart while she cannot move!
records.m_Talk_FRA: NOW! Stab her in the heart while she cannot move!

records.m_Talk_ENG: on it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: on it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: on it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haaaaa!!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haaaaa!!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haaaaa!!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... Ahh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... Ahh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... Ahh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it... all over now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it... all over now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it... all over now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, it was a clean strike.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, it was a clean strike.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, it was a clean strike.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Now, let us go back and
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Now, let us go back and
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Now, let us go back and
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Merlin...? I thought you were injured, but you're moving just fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Merlin...? I thought you were injured, but you're moving just fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Merlin...? I thought you were injured, but you're moving just fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
No... this is not
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
No... this is not
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
No... this is not
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fall back!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fall back!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fall back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Merlin...? Why did you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Merlin...? Why did you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Merlin...? Why did you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My body... It is moving on its own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My body... It is moving on its own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My body... It is moving on its own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's impossible!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's impossible!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's impossible!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thagirion...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thagirion...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thagirion...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you still alive...? I aimed straight at your heart...
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you still alive...? I aimed straight at your heart...
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you still alive...? I aimed straight at your heart...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The crimson sky... of the apocalypse...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The crimson sky... of the apocalypse...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The crimson sky... of the apocalypse...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I once had the same fate as you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I once had the same fate as you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I once had the same fate as you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it was only after I accepted the throne of the Demon Lord that I learned the fate was being the Antagonist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it was only after I accepted the throne of the Demon Lord that I learned the fate was being the Antagonist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it was only after I accepted the throne of the Demon Lord that I learned the fate was being the Antagonist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You, a Demon Lord, were... once human?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You, a Demon Lord, were... once human?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You, a Demon Lord, were... once human?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>When humanity is in crisis, the world will choose a new Antagonist.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>When humanity is in crisis, the world will choose a new Antagonist.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>When humanity is in crisis, the world will choose a new Antagonist.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew I would encounter someone like you if I chose to destroy the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew I would encounter someone like you if I chose to destroy the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew I would encounter someone like you if I chose to destroy the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I decided to gather all the world's remaining possibilities first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I decided to gather all the world's remaining possibilities first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I decided to gather all the world's remaining possibilities first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Possibilities...? I don't understand...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Possibilities...? I don't understand...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Possibilities...? I don't understand...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You found the Golden Branch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You found the Golden Branch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You found the Golden Branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The miracle imbued in the branch has saved her life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The miracle imbued in the branch has saved her life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The miracle imbued in the branch has saved her life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Obtaining the Golden Branch was a simple task.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Obtaining the Golden Branch was a simple task.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Obtaining the Golden Branch was a simple task.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I had to do was find traces of humanity, trample them, and take what they protected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I had to do was find traces of humanity, trample them, and take what they protected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I had to do was find traces of humanity, trample them, and take what they protected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since I lost one of them because of you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since I lost one of them because of you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since I lost one of them because of you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will now take one of yours in my own way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will now take one of yours in my own way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will now take one of yours in my own way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just know that my methods will... be more painful than what my sister had to suffer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just know that my methods will... be more painful than what my sister had to suffer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just know that my methods will... be more painful than what my sister had to suffer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Block the flanks of the blockade!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Block the flanks of the blockade!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Block the flanks of the blockade!

records.m_Talk_ENG: 3rd company! Head to the southern defense gate and reinforce the lost troops! Hurry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: 3rd company! Head to the southern defense gate and reinforce the lost troops! Hurry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: 3rd company! Head to the southern defense gate and reinforce the lost troops! Hurry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-captain! We're in trouble!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-captain! We're in trouble!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-captain! We're in trouble!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Violarite used to operate the barrier...! They are suddenly all combusting!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Violarite used to operate the barrier...! They are suddenly all combusting!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Violarite used to operate the barrier...! They are suddenly all combusting!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It should be blocking all the monsters' attacks... Is the indicator broken?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It should be blocking all the monsters' attacks... Is the indicator broken?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It should be blocking all the monsters' attacks... Is the indicator broken?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It may not be a malfunction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It may not be a malfunction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It may not be a malfunction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I remember this terrifying chill.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I remember this terrifying chill.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I remember this terrifying chill.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is the same as fifty years ago, when the sun disappeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is the same as fifty years ago, when the sun disappeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is the same as fifty years ago, when the sun disappeared.
